title: Spark Wheel
description: Retextures and renames flint and steel into a spark wheel, and gives the item an use animation.
body:
This pack changes the "flint and steel" item into a "spark wheel", which is a type single-handed fire striker, with both the texture and the item's name being changed.

The pack also gives the item a use animation, with sparks appearing to fly out the spark wheel as it is used by the player.
